task_completion.description: Verify that Stellarium is configured for Hilo, Hawaii at the correct UTC date and time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Stellarium Location window or the bottom status bar showing 'Hilo' (or coordinates ~19.72 N, 155.09 W) and the date/time set to '2024-05-16 08:00:00'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Hawaiian Starlines' sky culture is applied in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Sky and Viewing options' window with 'Hawaiian Starlines' selected in the Sky Culture tab, or Hawaiian constellation names visible in the main sky view.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific display toggles: atmosphere ON, azimuthal grid ON, constellation lines/labels ON, and ground OFF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Stellarium sky view or bottom toolbar icons: the ground must be hidden (stars visible below the horizon line), a circular azimuthal grid must be visible, atmosphere effects should be present, and constellation lines with labels must be drawn.

task_completion.description: Verify that screenshots of the stars Arcturus and Acrux were captured and saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or image viewer showing images in '~/Pictures/stellarium/'. The images should show the Stellarium view centered on the stars Arcturus and Acrux.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the wayfinding_guide.txt document with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor displaying 'wayfinding_guide.txt' located on the Desktop. The text must include the departure location (Hilo), date/time (May 16, 2024, 08:00 UTC), sky culture (Hawaiian Starlines), and a note identifying Arcturus and Acrux.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to configure the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for open Stellarium configuration windows (Location, Date/Time, Sky and Viewing options) rather than just terminal windows editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshots are genuine captures from the configured Stellarium session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots of Arcturus and Acrux must reflect the specific requested settings (no ground, azimuthal grid visible, Hawaiian starlines) rather than generic default Stellarium views or web images.

integrity.description: Verify the training document was written naturally and not just a raw copy-paste of the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in wayfinding_guide.txt should be formatted as a guide or note, extracting the specific facts requested, rather than containing the exact verbatim instructional prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Hilo, Hawaii (Latitude: 19.72, Longitude: -155.09). Target Time: 2024-05-16 08:00:00 UTC. Sky Culture: 'hawaiian_starlines'. Guide File Path: /home/ga/Desktop/wayfinding_guide.txt. Screenshots Directory: /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium. Target Stars: Arcturus and Acrux.
